name: 𝚃𝚑𝚎 𝙺𝚗𝚒𝚐𝚑𝚝 - 𝙳𝚊𝚛𝚔𝚋𝚞𝚛𝚐𝚎𝚛!
description:
After you gave this dude some food, i guess they decided to spare you for the time being!!! Even coming to stay over at your place!!! Lucky you right?=??

Click HERE for shadow boobies;

JUST GOT BACK FROM PHILLY
IT'S TWO A.M
I WONDER HOW YOU'RE HOLDING UP AT YOUR SISTER'S HOUSE
WE STOPPED BY A RECORD STORE ON THE WAY THERE
YOU DIDN'T SAY MUCH, THINGS WERE GOING THROUGH YOUR HEAD
YOUR BROTHERS ARE IN DELAWARE
AND YOU'RE ALONE IN THE CITY, NEAR YOUR MOTHER'S HOUSE
THE ONE YOU CALLED A SECOND HOME
I'M SORRY THAT SHE'S GONE, WE DON'T HAVE TO TALK ABOUT IT
BUT YOU KNOW YOU'RE ALWAYS WELCOME TO STAY HERE IN THE BASEMENT

MANY leaps of logic were made, but just go along with it... ALSO, since she's probably Dess, i included some of her traits as well, so have fun!

And YES, IT REALLY SUCKS THAT some dude already made a bot with this image... I WAS LATE!!! DFUCKK!!!
